evidence_basis: Commit bf08c3e contains the schemas and validate_workflow_state.py that were lost during the reset to 52e5a17
Current workflow/iteration-state.json exists and does not need to be restored from past unless corrupted
must_run_commands: git checkout bf08c3e -- schemas/execution-contract.schema.json schemas/execution-result.schema.json schemas/review-decision.schema.json schemas/iteration-state.schema.json scripts/validate_workflow_state.py
forbidden_actions: 进入任何 V0.5 实施
新增或修改 MCP tools / runtime / server
创建 tasks/v0.5-* 执行文件
修改协议语义以适配未来架构
自行补写 schema 内容而无证据依据
修改 restoration 范围外文件
acceptance_gate: 所有 required_outputs 存在且 JSON 格式有效，校验器脚本存在且可运行
